parties.name: TUCSON INVESTMENTS LLC, an Arizona limited liability company

legal_description.value: Lot 56, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19; Affidavit of Correction recorded in Document No. 2001-0849180

vesting.value: BRYANT JAMES T, an unmarried man, as his sole and separate property

warranty_scope.value: Special warranty — grantor warrants only against claims arising by, through, or under grantor; does not warrant against claims arising prior to grantor's acquisition via Treasurer's Deed (20220200005)

source_chain_note.value: Grantor (Tucson Investments LLC) acquired title via Treasurer's Deed recorded 2022-06-15 as Instrument No. 20220200005. Chain back to original fee owners Henderson James D and Tammy L (instrument 20050200001, 2005-03-21) is established through the tax-sale chain. The underlying 2005 Countrywide DOT (20050200002) was extinguished by operation of law under A.R.S. § 42-18267; no release of record.

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized investor-resale deed on parcel 304-78-401 (tax-sale REO scenario) — Tucson Investments flips the tax-acquired property to Bryant approximately 7 months after the Treasurer's Deed. Special warranty is standard on investor flips. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.

raw_api_response.synthesized_note: Demo-only investor flip deed for parcel 304-78-401 (tax-sale REO scenario); not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
